title: VimFu — zz Center Screen
description: zz scrolls the screen so the cursor line is in the center. The fastest way to get context around your current position.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z Z centers the screen on your cursor. Wherever you are, Z Z puts that line in the middle so you can see context above and below.
Jump to line twenty. The gen trap function.
The line might be near the edge. Z Z.
Centered. Code above and below. Full context.
Search for main. Slash main enter.
Found it and centered. Z Z after any jump keeps your bearings.
Z Z. Center screen. Use it after jumps, searches, or any time you want your cursor line front and center.
